title: [LowerToHW] Lower node op with a symbol into read_inout op

features.name: wire assignment from concatenation feeding another wire
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned from a concatenation of wires, where that wire is used as an operand in another wire assignment

features.name: node symbol preservation through lowering
features.description: Code should include a named wire derived from concatenation operations that is used without inlining its operands
